Title: Effects of germination and ultrasound treatment on the thermodynamics, nutritional and structural quality of highland barley fractions

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Health-promoting bioactive compound; associated in the paper with ACE inhibitory activity and functional food value
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Irreversibly converts glutamate to GABA under weakly acidic conditions
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; GAD enzyme activity assay; HPLC-based GABA quantification
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes GABA accumulation; expression and activity increased most strongly under ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mGAD expression significantly increased in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments in both whole barley flour and barley bran. 2. GAD activity increased about 1.5-fold in ultrasonication and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments. 3. Increased mGAD expression and GAD activity were associated with higher GABA accumulation, with the strongest effect in ultrasound-assisted germination.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target to increase GABA content in barley-based functional foods; processing conditions that induce mGAD may be combined with germination-based biofortification
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper refers to mGAD as relative mRNA expression rather than a specific locus identifier; activation is discussed as being regulated by pH and Ca2+/CaM.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Health-promoting bioactive compound; associated in the paper with ACE inhibitory activity and functional food value
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: required for GABA metabolism and pathway turnover
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Reversibly transforms GABA to succinic semialdehyde in the GABA metabolic pathway
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; GABA-T activity assay; HPLC-based GABA quantification
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with enhanced GABA metabolic activity under ultrasonication and ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mGABA-T expression significantly increased in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments in both barley fractions. 2. GABA-T enzyme activity was significantly augmented, especially in ultrasonication and ultrasound-assisted germination. 3. The gene is presented as a key GABA metabolism enzyme accompanying treatment-induced GABA accumulation.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential marker/target for tuning GABA shunt activity during barley processing or metabolic enhancement
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Although GABA-T is typically involved in GABA catabolism, the paper treats increased expression/activity as part of activated GABA metabolism accompanying net GABA accumulation under treatment.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Health-promoting bioactive compound; associated in the paper with ACE inhibitory activity and functional food value
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: required for downstream turnover of GABA-derived intermediate
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidizes succinic semialdehyde to succinate in GABA metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Indicates activation of GABA metabolic pathway under treatment conditions associated with increased GABA accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mSSADH transcript levels significantly increased in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments. 2. Upregulation accompanied elevated GABA pathway activity in both whole barley flour and barley bran. 3. Soaking had no significant effect.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential molecular marker of activated GABA shunt during processing optimization
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Included because it was directly assayed in Results, although the paper does not functionally dissect its individual causal contribution to final GABA levels.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Health-promoting bioactive compound; associated in the paper with ACE inhibitory activity and functional food value
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Polyamine degradation contributing to GABA formation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Oxidizes 4-aminobutyraldehyde to GABA in an alternative route linked to GABA accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with treatment-induced activation of GABA-related metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mAMADH expression increased significantly in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments. 2. Its upregulation accompanied enhanced GABA accumulation in both barley fractions. 3. Soaking had little or no significant effect.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential auxiliary engineering target to support GABA enhancement through alternative biosynthetic routes
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper measures transcript abundance only; exact pathway assignment and catalytic specifics were not deeply characterized in this study.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Total phenolic contents; total flavonoid contents
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antioxidant activity and functional food quality enhancement
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Deaminates phenylalanine to cinnamic acid, initiating phenylpropanoid metabolism for phenolic biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; total phenolic and total flavonoid quantification; antioxidant assays
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes phenolic/flavonoid accumulation associated with higher antioxidant activity
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mPAL expression significantly increased in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments. 2. The highest expression occurred in ultrasound-assisted germination, coinciding with the highest TPC, TFC, and antioxidant activity. 3. The study interprets mPAL induction as activation of the phenylpropanoid pathway in treated barley fractions.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Strong candidate for enhancing phenolic content and antioxidant capacity in barley processing or metabolic improvement strategies
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper discusses PAL together with C4H and 4CL as key enzymes, but only mPAL, mC3H, mCHS, and mC4H were directly measured.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Total phenolic contents; total flavonoid contents
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antioxidant activity and functional food quality enhancement
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates cinnamic acid to p-coumaric acid in phenylpropanoid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; total phenolic and total flavonoid quantification; antioxidant assays
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with increased phenolic/flavonoid synthesis and antioxidant activity in treated fractions
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mC4H expression significantly increased after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination. 2. Upregulation paralleled increased TPC, TFC, and antioxidant activity. 3. The data support activation of the phenylpropanoid pathway in barley fractions under these treatments.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Candidate pathway gene for boosting phenolic antioxidants in barley and related cereals
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Measured as relative transcript abundance only; no direct enzyme activity assay was reported.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite: Total phenolic contents; total flavonoid contents
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antioxidant activity and functional food quality enhancement
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Hydroxylation branch leading to diverse phenolics
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates p-coumaroyl-derived intermediates to caffeoyl intermediates in phenylpropanoid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; total phenolic and total flavonoid quantification; antioxidant assays
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with enhanced phenolic biosynthesis and antioxidant properties
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mC3H transcript levels increased significantly in treated whole barley flour and barley bran. 2. Highest expression occurred under ultrasound-assisted germination. 3. Upregulation was associated with elevated TPC, TFC, and antioxidant activity, indicating phenylpropanoid pathway activation.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Potential target for increasing specific hydroxycinnamate-derived phenolics in barley
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper does not provide a locus ID or direct enzyme assay.

Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Antioxidant activity and functional food quality enhancement
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Entry step into flavonoid branch from phenylpropanoid metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses p-coumaroyl-CoA with malonyl-CoA to form chalcone, initiating flavonoid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Upregulated in whole barley flour and barley bran after ultrasonication, germination, and especially ultrasound-assisted germination
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR; total flavonoid quantification; antioxidant assays
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with enhanced flavonoid accumulation and antioxidant activity in treated barley fractions
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. mCHS expression significantly increased in ultrasonication, germination, and ultrasound-assisted germination treatments. 2. Highest transcript levels were observed in ultrasound-assisted germination. 3. Upregulation coincided with increased total flavonoid content and higher antioxidant capacity in both whole barley flour and barley bran.
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful target for enhancing flavonoid enrichment in barley functional foods
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The study uses total flavonoid content rather than profiling individual flavonoid compounds.
